justification: The diff correctly upgrades Spring Boot 2.5.6 to 3.3.13 and Java 17 to 21, migrating javax to jakarta namespaces and replacing the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans. It uses Java 21 features like text blocks and List.getFirst(). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing the spring-boot-starter-test dependency (line 66-70) and the @Test import in Demo1ApplicationTests.java (line 4), which would break the build/tests. The MavenWrapperDownloader.java changes are unnecessary churn.
